commands.review_summary:
The PR registers google-vertex as a Google image/video generation provider and adds Vertex-specific image/video REST routing, metadata, and contract tests.

PR surface: Source +199, Tests +17. Total +216 across 10 files.

Reproducibility: yes. from source inspection: current main and v2026.6.1 register only google for image/video generation while the runtime looks up candidate.provider and fails when google-vertex is missing.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] This is a concrete, bounded Google plugin repair: keep the useful registration work, then fix the Vertex video request-policy and base URL handling before merge.
